owners: ResourceAccessPolicyPort remains the runtime authorization extension point; ResourceAclRepositoryPort owns ACL persistence contract.
invariants: Kernel must not depend on Spring/JDBC/Web; ACL rule status/effect/action/scope use enums or named constants; custom ResourceAccessPolicyPort beans must override default composition.
compatBoundary: No ContextPack domain invariant changes; no full IAM/RBAC; no policy language engine.
nonGoals: Do not introduce workflow engine, remote mesh, complex JSON policy language, or full IAM/RBAC.
